PreToolUse.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.env|*.env.*|package-lock.json) echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit .env or lock files directly' >&2; exit 1;; esac

PostToolUse.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */server/src/services/*|*/server/src/routes/*) npm run test:unit --workspace=server 2>/dev/null || true;; */client/src/*/*) npm run test:unit --workspace=client 2>/dev/null || true;; esac
